overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a driving simulator featuring an Audi TT navigating a multi-lane highway during a rainy night. The vehicle drives through moderate traffic, enters a long illuminated tunnel, and exits back onto the highway with distant urban lights visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway during heavy rain at night

events.description: approaching and entering the highway tunnel portal

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on rain-slicked highway, overtaking slower vehicles and approaching tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in same lane with brake lights occasionally visible
red car overtaking on the right side at high speed

entered.detail: metal guardrail with red reflective markers running parallel to the left side of the road
metal guardrail with red reflective markers on the right side of the highway
green illuminated highway directional sign with white text and arrows
dark tunnel entrance with concrete frame becoming visible as the vehicle approaches

segments.scene_description: The segment shows high-speed highway driving during a rainy night from the driver's perspective of an Audi TT. The vehicle navigates through moderate traffic on a wet asphalt road flanked by metal guardrails, with overhead green highway signs visible. Windshield wipers actively clear heavy rain as the car approaches a tunnel entrance in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated highway tunnel with concrete walls and ceiling

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady high speed through the tunnel, following the vehicle ahead and navigating the enclosed space

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with red brake lights illuminated, maintaining distance through the tunnel

entered.detail: concrete tunnel wall with horizontal construction lines and white painted lower section
concrete tunnel wall with white painted lower section and reflective markers
rows of overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel ceiling in a regular pattern

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters and drives through a long, well-lit highway tunnel. The scene is enclosed by concrete walls on both sides with rows of overhead lights creating a rhythmic pattern. The rain and weather are no longer visible, though the road remains wet. The driver follows a vehicle ahead through the straight tunnel corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway at night with urban backdrop and speed limit signs

events.description: exiting the tunnel back into open highway environment with rain visible again

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and accelerating back onto the open highway, navigating through traffic with windshield wipers active again

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving parallel on the right side, maintaining speed

entered.detail: metal guardrail with red reflective markers resuming along the left side of the road
metal guardrail with red reflective markers on the right side
red illuminated overhead sign displaying speed limit of 70
distant city lights and building silhouettes visible on the horizon against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the tunnel and returns to the open highway environment where rain is again visible on the windshield. The scene opens up to show guardrails resuming on both sides and distant urban city lights on the horizon. Overhead red speed limit signs indicate 70 as the car continues driving through moderate traffic on the wet highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective of an Audi TT as it transitions from a rainy open highway into a brightly lit tunnel and back out into the night. It begins with high-speed driving on wet asphalt under heavy rain, with windshield wipers clearing the view as the car navigates through moderate traffic toward a distant tunnel entrance. As the vehicle enters the tunnel, the open sky and rain vanish, replaced by an enclosed concrete corridor where rows of overhead lights create a rhythmic pattern along the straight road. The scene then opens back up as the car exits the tunnel, returning to the rainy environment where guardrails resume and red speed limit signs appear. Finally, the view expands to reveal distant urban city lights on the horizon as the vehicle continues its journey through the wet highway traffic.
